case_title: JUDITH ANN FIERMONTE VS. SHASTA NELSON DBA GIRLFRIEND CIRCLES, LLC

docket_entries.description: THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF FIERMONTE, JUDITH ANN RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT SHASTA NELSON DBA GIRLFRIEND CIRCLES, LLC $500.00 PRINCIPAL, $175.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $675.00, JUDGMENT IS ONLY FOR THE MISLEADING ADVERTISEMENT ON DEFENDANT'S WEBSITE. CLAIMS FOR TRIP EXPENSES REFUND DENIED & SHOULD BE BROUGHT AGAINST ALTRUVISTAS; NO MONIES WERE PAID TO MS. NELSON. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
STIPULATION FOR HEARING BEFORE PRO TEM JUDGE MICHAEL MAU. FILED BY FIERMONTE, JUDITH ANN SHASTA NELSON DBA GIRLFRIEND CIRCLES, LLC
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $6,875.50 FILED BY FIERMONTE, JUDITH ANN AS TO DEFENDANT SHASTA NELSON DBA GIRLFRIEND CIRCLES, LLC ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR SEP-28-2015 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF OCT-22-2015 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF OCT-22-2015 BY JUDGE PRO TEM MICHAEL MAU. PLAINTIFF WAS PRESENT. DEFENDANT WAS PRESENT. PLAINTIFFS EXHIBITS RETAINED. DEFENDANTS EXHIBITS NOT RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM: MICHAEL MAU. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)
REQUEST TO POSTPONE SMALL CLAIMS HEARING FILED BY DEFENDANT SHASTA NELSON DBA GIRLFRIEND CIRCLES, LLC
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (FEE FOR SERVICE:$100.00) SERVED AUG-20-2015, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT SHASTA NELSON DBA GIRLFRIEND CIRCLES, LLC
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF OCT-22-2015 - JUDGMENT.
ORDER GRANTING REQUEST TO POSTPONE TRIAL
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF SEP-28-2015 - CONTINUED PER REQUEST OF DEFENDANT TO OCT-22-2015 AT 3:30 PM IN DEPT. 506
